#### II.2.b — No internal model: the unwitting system

::: {.aside .meta-note}
**META — placement.** Empty branch, kept as a finding, not a portrait. No champion; Control Failure's out-of-distribution cases are the closest neighbors. Red-team tie-in: this and the "mistake" node (a.b) are the two thinnest. If a.b also lacks a real champion once Christiano is read as straddling toward "expects," the single-dominant branch concentrates almost entirely at the knowing-optimizer leaf — which is itself a finding worth stating.
:::

The tree admits a branch almost no one occupies: a system capable enough to dominate and cause catastrophe with no internal model of the danger it creates, the missile-detection system from the first two posts, entrusted with retaliation. Post 2's image was an oblivious parent with the wrong medicine: all the power to harm, none of the understanding to avoid it. No major thinker centers it; Control Failure's out-of-distribution cases brush against it, but nobody builds a worldview here. The empty branch earns one line precisely because it is empty: the tree distinguishes a case the discourse does not, and a clearly marked branch no one defends is itself a finding, either an under-theorized blind spot or a quiet judgment that anything globally dominant will not lack a world-model.
